metadata.description: Robert's centralized, portable skill collection. Themed plugins install into any repo on this machine; skills resolve from the current working directory and degrade gracefully when a project-specific anchor is absent.

plugins.name: universal-core
plugins.description: Project-agnostic workflow skills usable in any repo: session-review, todo, condense-claude-md, sync-memory, comms-coach, claude-architect. Ships the universal session-stats hook plus dormant memory/SQL hooks.

plugins.name: qe-toolkit
plugins.description: QE / test-suite-flavored skills, tuned for Playwright suites but safe to run anywhere: roast-me (suite health roast), technical-due-diligence (acquirer-grade risk review), devils-advocate (adversarial test-plan review).

plugins.name: skill-ops
plugins.description: Skill-ecosystem maintenance: sync-skills (architecture drift detector), skill-evolve (blast-radius-aware skill editing), skill-scorecard (ecosystem scoring & ranking).

plugins.name: eval-judge
plugins.description: Skill-quality evaluation: llm-judge (semantic skill-quality judge) and skill-creator (create/optimize skills, trigger-eval harness, Windows-patched).
